text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of a long and arduous
journey in the Twinkle Series for me and my
trainee. Her name is...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hi! I'm Bamboo Memory, Tracen Academy's
disciplinary committee chair!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm super ultra pumped for this! Red-hot battles
with my rivals, bonding over our fierce
competition—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: OOOOOH, I can't contain the excitement any longer! We've gotta run into the sunset all together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with <chrname>!
